channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: La Salle women's field hockey teams calls for end to 'senseless gun violence' after shooting ends game early
item.description: The La Salle field hockey team called for an end to "senseless gun violence" after one of their games ended abruptly due to a nearby shooting last week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Napheesa Collier scores 26 to help Lynx top Sun 90-81 and take 2-1 lead in semifinal series
item.description: UNCASVILLE, Conn. (AP) — After struggling in the last game offensively, Napheesa Collier wasn't going to let it happen again. The Lynx's star scored 26 points and Minnesota beat the Connecticut Sun 90-81 on Friday night to take a 2-1 advantage in the best-of-five semifinal matchup.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Gauff rallies to reach China Open final. Sinner and Alcaraz win in Shanghai
item.description: BEIJING (AP) — Coco Gauff rallied from a set down for the third consecutive match as she beat Paula Badosa 4-6, 6-4, 6-2 on Saturday to advance to the final of the China Open.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pittsburg powers past Los Gatos behind some ‘thunder’ and a lot of ‘lightning’
item.description: Truly Bell has two interceptions as Pittsburg puts away Los Gatos in a frenetic second half that featured three Marley Alcantara touchdown passes.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Syracuse rallies to force overtime and beat No. 25 UNLV 44-41, spoiling Rebels' poll debut
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — LeQuint Allen told Syracuse coach Fran Brown in the first half that the pain in his lower left leg was an eight out of 10. He also said he wasn’t coming out of the game.
item.dc:creator: W.G. RAMIREZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bronny James begins his Lakers career with a preseason debut. LeBron won't join until the next game
item.description: PALM DESERT, Calif. (AP) — Bronny James played in his first NBA preseason game Friday night, but LeBron James wasn't in uniform with him when the Lakers hosted Minnesota in the first of Los Angeles' two weekend games in the Coachella Valley.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Aaron Rodgers says Davante Adams is 'a great player' but knows a potential trade is out of QB's control
item.description: Star wide receiver Davante Adams has a couple of years remaining on his contract with the Las Vegas Raiders, but the six-time Pro Bowler wants to be traded.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jazz counting on Hendricks and George to take big strides
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With its commitment to a youth movement, the Utah Jazz are counting on Keyonte George and Taylor Hendricks to both take big strides in their second seasons this year. After playing in 75 games as a rookie, George wore down a bit at the end of the year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mets name surprising pitcher as Game 1 starter after he was thought to miss rest of season
item.description: The New York Mets announced on Friday that Kodai Senga, who was thought to be out for the rest of the season, will start Game 1 of the NLDS.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kyle Busch is in danger of snapping his NASCAR-record 19-year winning streak
item.description: TALLADEGA, Ala. (AP) — Time is running out for Kyle Busch to stretch his remarkable winning streak to 20 consecutive NASCAR seasons with at least one victory. There are only six races remaining on the year as Busch heads to Talladega Superspeedway, where he has won twice in his career.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Giants star rookie Malik Nabers remains in concussion protocol, ruled out vs. Seattle
item.description: New York Giants head coach Brian Daboll said Friday that Malik Nabers will not travel to Seattle for Sunday's game as he continues to make progress in concussion protocol.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Celtics beat the Nuggets 107-103 in the NBA's preseason opener at Abu Dhabi
item.description: ABU DHABI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — The NBA returned to the Persian Gulf on Friday for the third consecutive year, and the preseason schedule for the 2023-24 season opened with the Boston Celtics beating the Denver Nuggets 107-103 in a matchup of the two most recent championship clubs.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
